components.name: Protocol Research
components.description: Capturing and documenting network traffic between the Rec Room client and official servers.
components.notes: 21 subdomains discovered via TLS SNI sniffing (April 3rd, 2026) by crasho-rr and PoimeYT. All traffic is TLS 1.2. Most subdomains on Cloudflare; img.rec.net and cdn.rec.net on Azure. See docs/api/subdomains.md.

components.name: API Documentation
components.description: Building a reference of all known endpoints, request/response formats, and auth flows.
components.notes: Subdomain map complete. 40+ endpoints documented across social, players, rooms, images, moderation, avatar, inventions, config, and content moderation categories. All use base URL https://api.rec.net. Endpoint request/response formats still unknown due to TLS encryption — methods are inferred. See docs/api/rec_room_apis.md.

components.name: REST API Server
components.description: Account management, room listings, inventory, friends — the full web backend.
components.notes: Priority subdomain order identified: auth > accounts > rooms > match > api > econ/commerce > chat > lists > img/cdn.

components.name: Photon Relay
components.description: Reimplementing or replacing the Photon SDK layer for real-time multiplayer.
components.notes: match.rec.net identified as the matchmaking subdomain. Likely connects to Photon backend.

components.name: Auth System
components.description: Login, accounts, and sessions — open so anyone can connect without the official backend.
components.notes: auth.rec.net confirmed as highest priority — nothing works without it. Resolves to Cloudflare (104.18.8.90).

components.name: Client Redirect
components.description: Patching or proxying the client to connect to RestoRoom servers after June 1st.
components.notes: EasyAntiCheat blocks mitmproxy on PC. SSL pinning blocks cert interception on Android. Frida hooking of UnityWebRequest/HttpClient in progress as next approach.
